race.comment: Open race to close out the card. It's hard to knock the form of SPIRIT OF BRODIE (7) who has won three of his past four including a strong victory over this track and trip last time out. Drawn perfectly for this sprint trip from the inside alley and should be right there at the business end. MUSCHIALLI (4) got the chocolates here last time out and winning rider Callow stays on top. Again gets the benefit of her claim and can play a major role in the finish again. ARISPHERE (6) has placed two of three over this course and distance and must be respected out of the Gollan camp. Top-three candidate. THELWELL (10) gets in well at the weights with the claim and may trouble the judge with any luck in running. HOLY RACKET (3) next in line while fresh.
